response.global_summary: This video captures a 3D live performance of the song "出囃子ジャポニズム" (Debayashi Japonism) by Hololive VTuber 儒烏風亭らでん (Juufutei Raden). The performance features intricate choreography, followed by a talk segment about her new outfit, reaching 100,000 subscribers, and upcoming content.

scenes.description: The video begins with the performer posing on stage in her new outfit, preparing to perform. No vocal music is playing.
The performance of the original song "出囃子ジャポニズム" takes place. The performer sings and dances to the energetic, upbeat track, which has a mix of traditional and modern Japanese elements.
